case_title: HAROLDO CARABETTI DALTIN VS. RINA CHAN

docket_entries.description: ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT CHAN, RINA

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DALTIN, HAROLDO CARABETTI RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHAN, RINA $1,785.00 PRINCIPAL, $60.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,845.00, THE JUDGMENT REPRESENTS DAMAGES FOR THE VALUE OF PLAINTIFF'S CAR. THE COURT DOES NOT AWARD ANY ADDITIONAL DAMAGES FOR LOSS OF USE BEYOND THE AMOUNT PREVIOUSLY PAID ON DEFENDANT'S BEHALF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,100.67 FILED BY DALTIN, HAROLDO CARABETTI AS TO DEFENDANT CHAN, RINA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-21-2008 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAR-21-2008, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CHAN, RINA
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-21-2008 - JUDGMENT.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED AUG-01-2008 ORDERED DESTROYED
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-21-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-21-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. EXHIBITS FROM BOTH SIDES RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF DALTIN, HAROLDO CARABETTI AS TO DEFENDANT CHAN, RINA
